clips.name: Wasteland Cityscape
clips.prompt: cyberpunk wasteland city skyline at dusk, ruined skyscrapers half-buried in sand, flickering neon signs reflecting on rusted metal, volumetric god rays through dust clouds, distant dome megastructure, blade runner aesthetic, hyperdetailed
clips.camera: Wide push-in, slow forward drone movement

clips.name: Survivor Close-up
clips.prompt: cybernetic hand with glowing exoskeleton glove reaching into sand, picking up cyan luminous data chip, tiny electric sparks at fingertips, shallow depth of field, rusted metal background, cinematic lighting
clips.camera: Medium close-up, focus pull from sand to chip, slight handheld shake
clips.color_grading: Cyan chip as key light, shadows tinted purple
clips.sfx: Electric crackle, sand friction, low hum

clips.name: Holographic Triptych
clips.prompt: triptych of three quick cuts: cracked CRT monitor with neon japanese advertisement, translucent blue holographic geisha projection on crumbling concrete wall, underground cables sparking electric arcs, glitch aesthetic
clips.camera: Fast cuts: CRT screen, hologram, cables (3x1s each)
clips.sfx: CRT buzz, data glitch noise, spark explosions

clips.name: Megastructure Reveal
clips.prompt: aerial drone view rising above cyber wasteland revealing massive biomechanical structure buried beneath ruined city, glowing orange veins pulsing through metal skeleton, sand blowing away, epic cinematic scale
clips.camera: Aerial rising, slight downward tilt, epic reveal
clips.color_grading: Orange veins as highlights, deep brown-purple shadows

clips.name: Neon Pulse Finale
clips.prompt: close-up of glowing cyan data chip being inserted into rusty terminal port, massive energy surge building up, cyan shockwave expanding in slow motion, cyberpunk, symmetrical composition, dark background
clips.color_grading: Shockwave as sole light source, full black background
clips.sfx: Energy buildup pitch rise, shockwave boom, deep bass sustain

audio.bgm_style: Dark Ambient / Industrial, 60-80 BPM, C minor
audio.narration: Optional: deep male voice, gritty whisper
